transcript: You know, you're so bad... you know? Ah, y'know, you're recordin' somethin', and I don't... you know, it's fine with me, 'cause I have nothing to hide.
Uh, I don't know what the situation is with you.
Oh, yeah, yeah... you're, you're bad, aren't ya?
Yeah, little bitty, little bitty kids, asking for-- '[beep]' --thinkin' back to little Travis, but they're calling the wrong number, thinking their buddy lives here.
Huh. Yeah, but do you wanna play, or something?
Yeah, with little kids, I guess.
You're gonna be playin' with my whip, if you don't put him on.
Hey, fuck you, pal, okay? You under--'[beep]'--stand my language? There is no Travis here, and what can I tell you to... to fuck off?
